data.title: Chris Pierce Reiterates Buy on Carvana, Boosts Price Target to $600 on Long-Term Growth and Margin Expansion Outlook
data.description:
In a report released today, Chris Pierce from Needham reiterated a Buy rating on Carvana Co, with a price target of $600.00.

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Chris Pierce has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors highlighting Carvana’s position as his top large-cap growth idea, supported by a long runway in unit expansion and operating leverage. He believes the market is undervaluing the company’s longer‑term earnings power, particularly as management has resumed strong execution and earlier worries around retail gross profit per unit have proven short‑lived.

Pierce also sees growing efficiency in selling, general, and administrative expenses relative to his conservative forecasts and the company’s long‑term outlook. Reflecting this confidence, he raised his price target to $600, based on applying a robust multiple to projected 2028 adjusted EBITDA and assuming Carvana reaches its 3 million retail unit objective at healthy margins by 2033.

In another report released today, Barclays also maintained a Buy rating on the stock with a $475.00 price target.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
